creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 209309
v1

Upstream development has stalled, so let's apply a patch from PR and enable WAYLAND option like bug 227509. By default (if -m is not passed) the patch makes redshift try "wayland" method before "drm". Given "drm" doesn't work under X11 it's not much worse than before i.e., X11 users still have to pass "-m randr" or have "adjustment-method = randr" in ~/.config/redshift.conf.

Tested via x11-wm/sway.
